mapper.sql: B.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, B.BIZ_ID AS bizId, B.BIZ_TYPE AS bizType, B.BIZ_REG_NO AS bizRegNo, B.BIZ_NAME AS bizName, B.CEO_NAME AS ceoName, B.PHONE AS phone, B.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, B.JOIN_DATE AS joinDate, A.AUTH_ID AS authId, A.APPLY_DATE AS applyDate
JOIN TB_BUSINESS_AUTH A ON A.BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO AND A.AUTH_ID = ( SELECT AUTH_ID FROM TB_BUSINESS_AUTH WHERE BIZ_NO = B.BIZ_NO ORDER BY APPLY_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_BUSINESS B
WHERE B.STATUS_CD = #{statusCd} ORDER BY A.APPLY_DATE DESC
